subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! We have repeatedly heard thy call. He, verily, is the Hearer of every mention and call that riseth up [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی ندایت را مکرر شنیدیم اوست سمیع ذکر و ندای هر ندا کننده
subcodes.subjects: @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @spiritual transformation, @power of prayer, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
